title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent with a modular core of read, write, edit, and bash capabilities. It supports extensions written or installed from npm and git, and works with any compatible model including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6. Users can customize agents through prompt templates and skills without relying on frontier models with strict rate limits.
